compiled_state.title: Onboarding fails to install dso shim: agent cannot locate shim template file
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: During onboarding, the agent struggled to find the DSO shim template file needed to install the dso shim at .claude/scripts/dso. The agent had to search for it, causing the step to fail. Onboarding must have a reliable, deterministic path to the shim template.
